Author: Ehno
Name: PenumbraSort
Punchline: Reorganize Penumbra mod folders live via IPC, with sort strategies, protection, undo, and CSV export.
Description: Reorganize Penumbra mod folders live via IPC, with sort strategies, protection, undo, and CSV export. Note: Penumbra's API doesn't support deleting folders, so folders left empty after a sort must be removed manually in Penumbra's own mod list.
